description_long: This is a pair of modern suburban houses situated on a corner lot, each with a gable roof and surrounded by landscaped greenery. The houses feature large windows, front porches with steps, and driveways leading to garages. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light-colored siding and brickwork, with neatly trimmed lawns and small trees accentuating the property. The houses are separated by a shared driveway and have fenced backyards. The street and sidewalk wrap around the property, providing easy access from two sides. The overall design is clean, functional, and typical of contemporary residential neighborhoods.
description: A pair of modern suburban houses with gable roofs, large windows, front porches, and landscaped yards on a corner lot.
description_view_0: View from the street corner showing both houses, their front porches, driveways, and surrounding greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the houses, fenced backyards, and the alignment of windows and doors.
description_view_2: Angled view focusing on the main entryways, garages, and the intersection of the two streets.
description_view_3: Front-facing view of both houses, clearly showing the porches, steps, and main doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large front-facing windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature covered porches with steps, single front doors, and minimal decorative elements.
